data.content:
Implementation review APPROVED. Verified against knot description:
1. Parent knots cannot advance past any direct child's state - enforced via rank comparison in state_hierarchy::plan_state_transition(), returns error code hierarchy_progress_blocked with blocker list.
2. Terminal state cascade requires explicit approval (--cascade-terminal-descendants flag or TTY prompt) - returns terminal_cascade_approval_required error with descendant list when unapproved.
3. Upon approval, all descendants (direct+indirect) cascade to terminal state depth-first; already-terminal descendants skipped.
4. CLI flags added to state/update/next commands. Interactive prompt for TTY sessions, hard error for non-interactive.
5. Cascade events audited with cascade_approved and cascade_root_id fields.
6. Comprehensive tests: unit (state_hierarchy_tests.rs, tests_hierarchy.rs), write_dispatch, CLI integration (cli_state_hierarchy.rs).
7. make sanity passes: format, lint, all 456 tests, 95.10% coverage.
8. New files under 500-line limit. write_dispatch.rs and app.rs growth is on pre-existing over-limit files.
